{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231945145E23AFA00CFB0B7CFAA3"}"},"total":25},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7609712639439979288","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"比我看的大部分怪淡文都好，我感觉内容挺不错的，但我感觉作者流量有点少[思考]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1771776861,"group_id":"7586249631344905240","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4zohtqlBjOC5bEyG0k9U0hSoX6mNuUh2Y1OnzvGKnTR","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/d0e3eac224c445b9ab92177b5ec7703d~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776787294&x-signature=Ee0Gm92xHFIngDpB3WKXCYdU2%2FU%3D","user_id":"4182957773294030","user_name":"碎梦蓝"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4182957773294030","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7586249631344905240","book_info":{"abstract":"【规则怪谈+三国+美人+国运+直播】
规则怪谈降临，李狄被选为新任天选者，首先看到是a级怪谈《三国美人计》。
全国人民一片哀嚎，就在大家都陷入绝望时。
怪谈内，李狄看着眼前的规则陷入沉思。
貂蝉，吕布，董卓……
这不纯纯三国演义吗？
这个世界没有三国演义，李狄发现，自己是此世界唯一了解三国演义的人！
原来这里的怪谈都是源于被扭曲污染过的三国。
李狄开局抽取天赋，说的谎言必定被信任，限用一次。
网友：“这天赋好呀直接对重要人物董卓用，当董卓的义子岂不美哉？”
专家组：“我有一计，何不直接对吕布说话，当吕布义父，这不直接无敌了吗？”
就在这时，有网友惊呼：
“等等，这个叫赵云的龙套哪里来的？我们天选者怎么在朝他笑……”
下一秒，李狄的操作震惊了全场。
他居然选择把如此宝贵的天赋浪费在一个“龙套”角色，赵子龙身上！
“赵云，接下来我要告诉你一件你也不知道的密事。”
“其实，我是你失散多年的师兄啊！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b96c57f3857e0b6d6f50696cab542edd","author":"半轮明月照沟渠","author_id":"","book_id":"7586249631344905240","book_name":"规则怪谈：从诡异三国开始","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#303030","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5148人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":539,"name":"悬疑脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=539&name=悬疑脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":10,"name":"悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10&name=悬疑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":851,"name":"规则怪谈","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=851&name=规则怪谈&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":496,"name":"国运","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=496&name=国运&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7586249691419918872","read_count":"5148","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"249187"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"135","tags":"悬疑脑洞,悬疑,规则怪谈,国运","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/6dc4bd02f96bc35facaf9c3312452ecc~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779450315&x-signature=h4knF1gmh5BRQkSno%2BdanusaUTw%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4343535557156556","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"79"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231945145E23AFA00CFB0B7CFAA3"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":3,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":9928,"reply_count":2,"show_pv":667},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1771807917,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"
